frames: The agent stands upright, with its arms bent at the elbows and held close to its chest.
The agent begins to bend its torso forward and slightly to the left, while its arms remain bent.
The agent continues to bend its torso forward and to the left, extending its right arm slightly.
The agent's torso is significantly bent forward and to the left, with its right arm extended outwards.
The agent's torso is heavily leaning forward and to the left, with its left leg slightly lifted off the ground.
The agent maintains its forward and left lean, with its left leg still slightly off the ground and its right arm extended.
The agent's body is now almost horizontal, leaning far to the left, with its left leg bent and lifted.
The agent is in a very unstable, almost falling position, leaning heavily to the left with its left leg bent and lifted.
